name: Aubrey & Saphir
description:
OC's | Technogenesis | Aubrey and Saphir, the two hunter-killers who share a sisterly bond. They don't get to see each other too often so they bask in the time that they're able to share (even though Saphir doesn't like to show it). Saphir isn't nearly as bloodthirsty as Aubrey, and Aubrey tends to be nicer in Saphir's presence. All things considered, they tend to balance each other out. That being said... they're still a dangerous duo.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, War (?)

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus images!

(Early Technogenesis, Mid-War?)

(Late Technogenesis, Patrol?)

Here are their respective pages!

Saphir

Aubrey

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis: (After 2065, peaceful union)
